name: golang-github-cespare-xxhash-dev
title: golang-github-cespare-xxhash-dev
summary: Go implementation of the 64-bit xxHash algorithm (XXH64)
description:
Go implementation of the 64-bit xxHash algorithm (XXH64)
xxhash is a Go implementation of the 64-bit xxHash
(http://cyan4973.github.io/xxHash/) algorithm, XXH64. This is a
high-quality hashing algorithm that is much faster than anything in the
Go standard library.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-cespare-xxhash-dev because Go implementation of the 64-bit xxHash algorithm (XXH64).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-cespare-xxhash-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-cespare-xxhash-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-cespare-xxhash-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
